problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
